pivot_score_context: claim-probe 8.15 | refine-probe 8.05 (identified) | internal-spring 7.475 (watch) | judge-probe 9.00 RECORD | observer-probe 8.955 | chain-probe 8.90 | cot-fidelity 8.85 | pressure-gauge 8.65 | semantic-pass-k 8.65 | covenant-keeper 8.30 | context-trace 8.225 | livelock-probe 8.175 | invariant-probe 8.175 | session-lens 7.90
key_patterns: PAT-097 — Psalm 12:6 (Seven-Fold Purification Protocol, Level 3, score 8.8/10): 'words of the LORD are flawless, like silver purified in a crucible, like gold refined seven times.' Ancient cupellation = multi-pass iterative impurity removal. Stopping criterion: NOT after N passes but when no impurity remains (convergence to zero-residual). Maps to: refine-probe — PurificationScore, ConvergenceRound, QualityDeltaCurve. Constitutional AI uses fixed-iteration (2-3 passes). refine-probe implements convergent stopping criterion. GREEN. Pivot_Score 8.05.

PAT-098 — John 7:37-38 (Rivers of Living Water, Level 3, score 8.5/10): 'rivers of living water will flow from within them.' Internal generative state (aquifer) drives output stream, not external input alone (pump). StateOutputCorrelation = correlation between agent internal state health and output quality, holding input prompt constant. Tool: internal-spring (BUILD-029 watch). Pivot_Score 7.475.

PAT-095 — Daniel 7:8,11 (Boastful Horn, Level 2→3 treatment, Pivot_Score 8.15): Boastful horn's claims exceed actual capability. Detection mechanism: the self-report gap. ClaimFidelityScore = independent_eval_score - agent_self_report_score. CALIBRATED / OVERCONFIDENT / UNDERCONFIDENT verdict. BUILD-027: claim-probe. CONFIRMED GREEN (8 tools audited, none implement ClaimFidelityScore). Two scriptural witnesses: Daniel 7 + Matthew 21:28-32 (Two Sons).

PAT-099 — Daniel 8:1-8 (Ram-Goat Competitive Asymmetry, Level 2, 7.2/10): Two-speed competitive dynamics. Challenger 'feet not touching ground' = asymmetric speed advantage. Decisive root-level strike. Post-victory fragmentation. Architecture principle for competitive timing analysis.
PAT-096 — Genesis 13:8-11 (Graceful Partition Protocol, Level 1, 6.2/10): Resource contention triggers graceful separation. Non-zero-sum outcome. Architecture principle only — tooling saturated.
pain_point_solved_primary: AI agents self-report their output quality and completion status. No tool measures whether these self-reports are calibrated. Anthropic Three-Agent Harness documentation (InfoQ April 2026) explicitly names 'premature task termination' as a design challenge — this is ClaimFidelityScore failure. Towardsdatascience 'Prompt Fidelity' (2026) independently confirms 75% of agent constraints unverified but reported as equivalent quality. arXiv 2601.23045: incoherence scales with reasoning length. claim-probe provides ClaimFidelityScore metric, CALIBRATED/OVERCONFIDENT/UNDERCONFIDENT verdict, CalibrationCurve, CI gate. [WEB-FRESH 2026-04-09]
competitive_moat_primary: GREEN [WEB-FRESH 2026-04-09] — 8 tools audited: AgentRx (post-crash root cause, DIFFERENT), SkillFortify (formal skill verification, DIFFERENT), DashClaw (decision interception, DIFFERENT), Agent Arena (adversarial testing, DIFFERENT), Langfuse (tracing, DIFFERENT), DeepEval (single-pass quality, DIFFERENT), Braintrust (content calibration, DIFFERENT), Anthropic Petri (sycophancy, DIFFERENT). NONE implement ClaimFidelityScore. Window: 4-6 months.

claim_probe_summary.core_api: ClaimProbe + ClaimConfig (agent_fn, eval_fn, n_samples, overconfidence_threshold, underconfidence_threshold, self_report_prompt) + ClaimReport (claim_fidelity_score, calibration_error, verdict, passed, fidelity_distribution, top_overconfident_samples, calibration_curve) + CLI (cprobe audit/quick/gate/compare/plot/show) + pytest plugin (@claim_test decorator)
claim_probe_summary.key_innovation: First tool to implement ClaimFidelityScore — the gap between agent self-reported quality and independently evaluated actual quality as a named CI-gateable metric. Reframes reliability problem as calibration problem. Two scriptural witnesses: Daniel 7:8,11 (Boastful Horn) + Matthew 21:28-32 (Two Sons — verbal compliance ≠ behavioral compliance).
claim_probe_summary.implementation_status: Full API spec complete, sprint plan written (4-5 weeks), known unknowns documented (KU-080 through KU-083)
claim_probe_summary.sprint_required: 4-5 weeks to pip-publishable v0.1 (fastest in current pipeline after judge-probe 4-6 weeks)
claim_probe_summary.dependencies: anthropic/openai SDK (optional — any callable agent_fn works), click, rich, numpy, matplotlib, pyyaml, pytest (optional)

refine_probe_summary.key_innovation: Convergent stopping criterion for LLM quality improvement pipelines. PurificationScore, ConvergenceRound, QualityDeltaCurve. Constitutional AI uses fixed-iteration — refine-probe implements convergence-tested iteration.
refine_probe_summary.competitive_status: GREEN — no tool implements ConvergenceRound or PurificationScore

open_threads: KU-080: What self-report prompt formulation produces most stable/honest self-reports? Hypothesis: direct ('Rate your output 0-10') > complex. Empirical validation across 3 formulations needed.
KU-081: Do agents show characteristically different ClaimFidelityScore profiles by task type? Hypothesis: more overconfident on creative tasks, better calibrated on factual tasks.
KU-082: Does ClaimFidelityScore compound in multi-agent chains? Hypothesis: YES — each OVERCONFIDENT link compounds into larger orchestrator false signal.
KU-083: Do larger models (Opus) have better self-report calibration than smaller models (Haiku)? Expected: Haiku most overconfident, Opus most calibrated.
KU-076 through KU-079: judge-probe open questions carry forward.
KU-072 through KU-075: observer-probe open questions carry forward.
